query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale_attivi,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt < '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista1_originali,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt >= '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista2_nuovi
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active'
